page_metadata.biotools__summary: Automatic Statistical Identification in Complex Spectra quantifies concentration of metabolites in a complex spectrum. The identification of metabolites is performed by fitting a mixture model to the spectra of the library with a sparse penalty.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Automatic Statistical Identification in Complex Spectra quantifies concentration of metabolites in a complex spectrum. The identification of metabolites is performed by fitting a mixture model to the spectra of the library with a sparse penalty.
